help:
Available commands:
/start - Welcome message
/help - This help
/montepo - Next trains at Monte Po
/stesicoro - Next trains at Stesicoro
/milo - Next trains at Milo
/altri - Show other stations
/fontana, /nesima, /sannullo, /cibali, /borgo, /giuffrida, /italia, /galatea, /giovanni
/stop - Stop auto-refresh
/test DDMMYYYY HHMM - Activate test mode
/testfin - Deactivate test mode
Accessibility mode: /accessibilita

Or press the buttons.
no_trains_today: No more trains today. Service ends at {close_h:02d}:{close_m:02d}.
metro_closed: 🚇 The metro is closed at this time. It will reopen tomorrow at {next_open}.
metro_closed_first_train: 🚇 The metro is closed at this time. The first train from {station} will depart at {first_train}.
metro_closed_reopen:
🚇 The metro is closed at this time.
🕒 It will reopen at {next_open}.
train_departing_soon: 🚇 The train is on the platform. It will depart in **{time}**.
next_train_at: 🚇 Next train to {dest} departs in **{time}**, at {departure}.
following_train: 🚆 The following train will depart in {time}, at {departure}.
last_train: 🚆 This is the last train of the day.
auto_refresh_disabled: ⚠️ Auto-refresh has been disabled. Use the 'Aggiornare' button to manually update data.
nothing_to_stop: ⚠️ Auto-refresh is not active. Nothing to stop.
test_mode_deactivated: ✅ Test mode deactivated. Real time restored.
accessibility_activated:
♿ Accessibility mode activated.

Write or speak the name of the station you want to check.
Example: 'Monte Po' or 'Galatea'.

Available stations: {stations}

To exit, write 'Exit'.
accessibility_deactivated: ✅ Accessibility mode deactivated. You are back to the main menu.
accessibility_not_active: ⚠️ You are not in accessibility mode.
accessibility_chosen_station: You chose {name}. Here is the information:
no_trains_towards_montepo: No trains towards Monte Po at the moment.
no_trains_towards_stesicoro: No trains towards Stesicoro at the moment.
next_train_info: The next one will pass in {time}
next_train_info_at: The next one will pass in {time}, at {departure}.
no_train_info: 🔻 **Towards Stesicoro**: no trains at the moment.
